name: Jiamei Food Packaging (Chuzhou) Co.,Ltd
summary: Jiamei Food Packaging (Chuzhou) Co.,Ltd produces and sells beverage packaging products in China. It offers three-piece beverage cans, two-piece beverage cans, aseptic paper packaging products, and PET bottles, as well as filling services. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Cangzhou, China.
